news:news.news:title: LS Image Compressor — 100% private, in-browser image compression for JPG, PNG, WebP and AVIF
news:news.news:keywords: image compressor, WebP converter, AVIF converter, privacy-first, browser-based, free

news:news.news:title: Free online PDF compressor — shrink PDFs up to 90% in your browser, no upload

news:news.news:title: Bulk file renamer with 13 live rules — find and replace, numbering, date, case, regex
